products.name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
products.description: Bright and floral, with notes of citrus, bergamot, and jasmine. A delicate pour-over favorite.

products.name: Colombia Huila
products.description: Balanced and sweet, with caramel, red apple, and a smooth cocoa finish.

products.name: Kenya AA
products.description: Juicy and vibrant, with blackcurrant, grapefruit, and a winey acidity.

products.name: Espresso Forte
products.description: Our signature espresso blend — dark chocolate, toasted hazelnut, and a syrupy body.

products.name: Brazil Santos
products.description: Low-acid and nutty, with milk chocolate and roasted almond. Great with milk.

products.name: Sumatra Mandheling
products.description: Earthy and full-bodied, with cedar, dark cocoa, and a lingering spice.

products.name: Guatemala Antigua
products.description: Rich and complex, with brown sugar, orange zest, and a velvety mouthfeel.

products.name: Decaf Swiss Water
products.description: All the flavor, none of the caffeine. Chemical-free decaf with cocoa and dried fig.
